ModMetaData.name: HSK Patch: VQE Generator
ModMetaData.author: CarbineAction
ModMetaData.description:
Hardcore SK compatibility patch for Vanilla Quests Expanded — The Generator.
Brings VQE Generator structures and apparel into HSK conventions:
- Material swaps on all ARC genetrons (Basic, Wood-fired ×4, Chemfuel ×4, Geothermal ×4, Nuclear ×4) and ruined ancient buildings so deconstruction returns HSK-native refined materials: * Steel → SteelBar * Uranium → DepletedUranium
- Combat Extended rescale for the Ancient Tight Parka (Sharp / Blunt / Bulk / WornBulk) so it fits HSK CE armor math.
No content additions or removals — purely an XML PatchOperation overlay on top of the upstream VQE Generator mod.
Required: Vanilla Quests Expanded - The Generator, Hardcore SK, Combat Extended.
